h1: A Guide to Common Overmolding Materials

headings.text: A Guide to Common Overmolding Materials
Find the right plastic overmolding material
Why Does 3D Printing Layer Height Matter?

meta_description: Overmolding can be used for hand and power tools, which use different materials and textures for added comfort and grip.

sections.heading: A Guide to Common Overmolding Materials
sections.text: A Guide to Common Overmolding Materials Published on February 18, 2021 Originally published on fastradius.com on February 18, 2021 Injection molding is a tried-and-true method for rapidly producing plastic parts in high volumes, including common everyday items like bottle caps and storage containers. The process is ideal for jobs involving repeatable components, specific chemical resistances, and strict mechanical and performance requirements. In reality, the term “injection molding” can be thought of as an umbrella term encompassing a few different techniques, including insert molding and overmolding . While these two processes are similar in some ways, they have some key differences and i...
